final:
module dram_cell (
    input wire [15:0] data_in,
    input wire write_enable,
    input wire read_enable,
    input wire clk,
    output reg [15:0] data_out
);
    reg [15:0] cell_memory;

    always @(posedge clk) begin
        if (write_enable) begin
            cell_memory <= data_in;
        end
    end

    always @(posedge clk) begin
        if (read_enable) begin
            data_out <= cell_memory;
        end
    end
endmodule
